calendar.matters:
First And Final Report And Account Of Co-Trustee And Petition For Settlement Thereof And For Final Distribution; For Order Authorizing Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Laurelle Gutierrez and George Wailes for Wells Fargo Bank. Niel Horton for Herb Yanowitz. Jeffrey Bosshard for Frd Newhall Woods.

Discussion was held with regard to the issue of the $2,000,000.00 being/not being used for maintenance of the properties (Martha Vineyard/Newhall), the specific gifts, the disclaimer by Mr. Horton's Client, the Settlor's intent, the $1,000,000.00 gift to Wendy, etc. The Court granted the Petition for Order Approving Settlement (subject to review of the order). The accounting petition was taken under submission pending receipt and review of the order and filing of Mr. Bosshard's brief.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Court Reporter: Karla Ellis Davis, CSR#12998 (415)948-8289. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Reported)

Co-Trustees¿ Petition For Order Approving Settlement

First And Final Report And Account Of Co-Trustee And Petition For Settlement Thereof And For Final Distribution; For Order Authorizing Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-15-2013 Continued To Dec-03-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Wailes for Wells Fargo Bank (Co-Trustee). Neil Horton for Herbert Yanowitz (Co-Trustee). Jeffrey Bosshard for Fred Woods (Beneficiary).

Mr. Wailes reported that they had mediation on September 30, 2013 and that the Parties reached agreement on virtualy all of the issues but two (11-F and 12). Mr. Wailes also stated that they will file a petition for approval of the settlement and that the idea is for Wells Fargo to submit fees on the pleadings. The Parties stepped out of the courtroom to talk about how they wish to proceed. Upon returning, the Parties agreed to the following briefing schedule: 1) Mr. Bosshard is to file a brief about his objections by November 1, 2013. 2)Mr. Wailes and Mr. Horton are to file their responses by: November 19, 2013. 3)Replies are to be filed by November 26, 2013. The First and Final Report and Account of Co-Trustee, etc. was continued to December 3, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Court Reporter: Trina Ayala Cordini, CSR#12964 (650) 267-1302. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Reported)

First And Final Report And Account Of Co-Trustee And Petition For Settlement Thereof And For Final Distribution; For Order Authorizing Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-24-2013 Continued To Oct-15-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Co-Trustee To Combine And To Reform Trusts (Prob Code Sec 15411, 17200(A, (B)(13), (14)
Off Calendar Aug-20-2013 Granted Per Written Order

First And Final Report And Account Of Co-Trustee And Petition For Settlement Thereof And For Final Distribution; For Order Authorizing Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Continued To Sep-24-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Scott Atkinson and Laurelle Gutierrez for Wells Fargo Bank (Co-Trustee). John Donegan and Jeffrey Bosshard for Frederick Woods (Beneficiary). Neil Horton for and with Herbert Yanowitz (Co-Trustee).

Mr. Horton reported that the Parties came to an agreement with regard to the Petition of Co-Trustee to Combine and Reform Trusts and that they will file a stipulation with the Court. The stipulation is as follows: The Petition to Combine and Reform Trust will be granted. Wells Fargo will distribute the Trust except for $1,300,000.00 in accordance with the pending petition. To the extent possible, Wells Fargo will distribute cash to the Trust for Newhall and securities to the five charities. Counsel will submit an order to the Court to appoint Citi National Bank as Successor Trustee for the Newhall Trust. The Parties will participate in mediation and return to Court on September 24, 2013. The Court granted the Petition to Combine and Reform Trusts (subject to filing of the stipulation and review of the order). The First and Final Account of Co-Trustee, etc. was continued to Septmber 24, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Court Reporter: Trina Cordini, CSR#12964 (415)-948-8289. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Reported)
